command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Secret in systemd service env ==="
grep TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET /etc/systemd/system/hermes-gateway.service

echo ""
echo "=== Re-register webhook freshly with the SAME secret + check it takes ==="
SECRET="65b0642ca8a7fc2ae28fa8e8234895cd38fc88933dd9bf6a45157546c66b98a6"
curl -s -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/setWebhook" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d "{\"url\":\"https://sakura.cutegrafiks.com/telegram\",\"secret_token\":\"$SECRET\",\"drop_pending_updates\":false}" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('setWebhook:', d.get('ok'), d.get('description'))"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST: POST with WRONG secret (should be rejected ~401/403) ==="
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "wrong secret: %{http_code}\n" \
  -X POST http://localhost:8080/telegram \
  -H "X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token: WRONGSECRET123" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"update_id":777,"message":{"message_id":777,"date":1718000000,"chat":{"id":-1003934415467,"type":"supergroup"},"from":{"id":8869156588,"is_bot":false,"first_name":"Jose"},"text":"wrong secret test"}}' --max-time 10 2>/dev/null

echo "=== TEST: POST with NO secret header at all ==="
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "no secret: %{http_code}\n" \
  -X POST http://localhost:8080/telegram \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"update_id":778,"message":{"message_id":778,"date":1718000000,"chat":{"id":-1003934415467,"type":"supergroup"},"from":{"id":8869156588,"is_bot":false,"first_name":"Jose"},"text":"no secret test"}}' --max-time 10 2>/dev/null
REMOTE
